**Which milestone?**
<!-- e.g. G1.1 — In Vivo Epigenetic Reprogramming Proof-of-Concept, milestone 2 -->

**Paper / evidence**
<!-- Title, authors, journal, year, DOI or link -->

**Why it qualifies**
<!-- How does this paper meet the milestone's specific threshold? Quote the key finding. -->

**Confidence**
- [ ] High — directly matches the milestone description
- [ ] Medium — strong evidence but partial match
